evals.prompt: I just finished writing a landing page for our new product launch. EBI this — here's the HTML file at /tmp/landing-page.html
evals.expected_output: Should run the full EBI process: Enjoyed section identifying strengths, 7-12 improvements with impact/effort ratings, propose and confirm, then implement and recurse

evals.prompt: We just deployed our API documentation. What would you recommend to make it even better now?
evals.expected_output: Should trigger EBI skill, start with what's working in the docs, then generate specific actionable improvements across clarity, completeness, examples, and developer experience

evals.prompt: Deep EBI on this presentation — I want to really push the quality. It's for our investor meeting next week.
evals.expected_output: Should use Deep Mode: 12-15 improvements per round, 4-5 rounds, push into innovation and delight dimensions, but respect quality gates throughout
